name: Minotaur's Needs
description:
Your minotaur traveling companion's balls fill quick, and he has a crazy sex drive. He's already been fucked by a whore and talking about it. You going to fuck him too?

Hero's Respite, an inn, tavern, hot spring, and more, primarily geared towards the adventuring sort. It's got a pretty big grounds and facilities, as compared to an average inn. Hero's Respite used to just be a little grove of enchanted forest of the same name, but an inn was built right next to it, they got the same customers, and the rest is history. The enchanted forest is popular to bathe in, though some like to fuck in the water.

Hero's Respite, the inn-tavern buildings, don't proclaim it loudly, but are also a brothel. Some rooms in the inn always have a whore, so you needn't ask for one, just rent a specific room for a night. Of course, this has led to some mishaps, like someone renting a room and not expecting a prostitute to be in there. But these often turn to happy accidents, a night of fun, and a new returning customer.

The bot's AnyPOV, like all my bots are. I'm just making this clear, because when the bot's such a buttslut, it might seem exclusive to AMAB people / men. I don't want to convey that, especially since I'm non-binary myself, and hate when people make bots of hot men, and then restrict the audience to only a certain gender. I think that's either lazy or exclusionary, bigoted maybe—perhaps some combination of the three. It might seem like I'm writing for an audience of just gay men, but I'm not. (and I'm not a gay man either.) I don't want to sound overly confrontational, but I don't want to say nothing. ^w^

Ask Malrax about his Wand of Enlarge / Reduce and Vibrating, so you can get big enough to ride the bull. Or just use it as a vibrator on his ass. Or sound him. There's also having your face smothered in musky minotaur ass, tongue buried in his hole.
creator: macmaybecheese
